name: GitHub Tool Manager
summary: Public card catalog and GitHub repository management console for published tools.

vercel.notes: Import tuanhoangfx/GitHub-Tool-Manager on vercel.com; map infix1.io.vn in Domains.

health.note: Reads public GitHub metadata in-browser. Production deploy via Vercel (not GitHub Pages).
